headline: Sacral neuromodulation: broadening Boston Scientific’s European urology portfolio
summary: Boston Scientific added SNM to its urology portfolio following its 2024 acquisition of Axonics.

headline: Truist Securities Maintains Buy on Boston Scientific, Lowers Price Target to $92
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Richard Newitter   maintains Boston Scientific (NYSE:BSX) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $95 to $92.

raw.headline: Truist Securities Maintains Buy on Boston Scientific, Lowers Price Target to $92

headline: PFA startup Field Medical appoints Mark Turco as CEO
summary: Turco, an interventional cardiologist, has held roles including CEO of JC Medical and chief medical officer of Medtronic’s aortic and peripheral vascular business.
